data.description:
## Why
Deliver the optional agent-operations framework and the first reference op so
agents can review rebar work through rebar.

## What
- Pluggable Runner (LangGraph default / Langflow stub / Fake), reviewer registry
  (Langfuse prompts + packaged fallbacks), findings contract (`review_result`),
  and `review_ticket` over library, `rebar review`, and the gated MCP tool.
- Lazy imports so core stays stdlib-only; multi-provider via `init_chat_model`.

## Scope
Implemented on branch `claude/langflow-langfuse-setup-j8rotq` (commits tagged
`(llm)`), reviewed by two Opus agents + an OSS-gotchas research pass; fixes folded
in.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] Framework + op + three interfaces, schema-wired
- [x] Offline tests green; ruff gating set clean; zero interfaces-tier regressions
- [x] Code-review + research findings addressed (error vocabulary, sandbox deny-list, citation/clamp fixes, Langfuse flush, multi-provider)
data.title: Ship rebar.llm framework + review_ticket across library/CLI/MCP
